{{Infobox character
| name = Loreli
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = original strategist, scholar, Regent, historical hero, Luminian Regent, ruler delegeate and appointer of rulers guide,
| abilities = radiate an aura of peace and tranquility, healing abilities, Read people and their possessions, Reader, produces lightning-bright bolts of pure white
| affiliations = Empire, Luminian Order
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

''See also: [[Loreli Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Loreli is a historical figure and contemporary leader known as the original strategist and the founder of the [[Luminian Order]]. Though often studied by scholars as an ancient figure from the past, she is actually a living individual who has awakened to serve the [[Empire]] as the [[Regent of the West]]. She possesses immense natural talent that was refined under [[the Emperor]]'s guidance, allowing her to extend her awareness and sense things others cannot. Physically, she has a compact, muscular build and a youthful, rounded face that makes her appear much younger than her true age. She is frequently associated with silver-and-white military attire and braids. Her historical influence is so vast that her appearance and hairstyle have influenced fashion for centuries, and she is depicted in various historical reliefs. As a leader, she is driven by a desire to protect others and is known for her ability to radiate an [[aura]] of tranquility. Currently, she remains active in imperial affairs, managing intelligence and responding to cries for help.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An original strategist and scholar from the ancient past, Loreli once famously observed that a forgotten man is invisible. This great strategist currently serves the [[Empire]] in the role of [[Regent]]. Throughout her history, she has also been known as a companion to [[Jorin Maze-walker]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Loreli]] was an original strategist.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Loreli]] is a person who once said 'A forgotten man is invisible.'<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Loreli]] is a strategist and scholar from the ancient past who currently serves the [[Empire]] as a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Loreli]] was a great strategist.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Loreli]] is a companion of [[Jorin Maze-walker]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Loreli is a historical hero whose image is displayed within the [[Luminian cathedral]]. Once a [[Regent]] who engaged in a bet with another [[Regent]] and held meetings with the [[Guild Head]], she eventually joined the group following the rise of [[the Emperor]]'s self-proclaimed title. Currently positioned on the opposite side of a divide, she has previously demonstrated her influence by successfully talking an assassin out of taking her [[life]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Loreli]] is someone the [[Regent]] had a bet with.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Loreli]] is a [[Regent]] who met with the [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Loreli]] is a historical hero depicted in the [[Luminian cathedral]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Loreli]] joined the group after [[the Emperor]] began calling himself [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Loreli]] is on the other side of something (implied location) and had previously talked an assassin out of killing her.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As a strategist and ally to [[Shera]], Loreli is the founder of the [[Luminian Order]] who once struck down [[Urg’naut]], possessing an intent that stands in direct opposition to his own. Following a deal with [[Estyr]] that requires Loreli to step down from rule, they were reported to have snuck off to [[Izyria]]. While located on the [[Aion Sea]], the [[Luminian]] [[Regent]] serves in their trademark silver-and-white armor and possesses the abilities to heal, read people and their possessions, and radiate an [[aura]] of peace. During a confrontation, [[Estyr]] was levitating Loreli before they fell from the sky [[sword]]-first.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is one of the individuals who will step down from rule as part of [[Estyr]]'s deal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is reported to have snuck off to [[Izyria]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is a strategist and an ally of [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is the founder of the [[Luminian Order]] and once struck [[Urg’naut]] down.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli's Intent]] is the direct opposite of [[Urg’naut]]'s.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is located on the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is the [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] wears trademark silver-and-white armor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] can radiate an [[aura]] of peace and tranquility.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] has healing abilities.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is a [[Luminian]] [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] has the ability to [[Read]] people and their possessions.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] falls from the sky [[sword]]-first.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] was being levitated by [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] once suggested that Loreli might still be alive, a woman described as having dark skin and hair styled in a hundred braids. As the daughter of [[the Emperor]], she served as the original [[Pilgrim]] and [[Knight]], eventually becoming the [[Regent of the West]] and the first of the [[Luminian Order]]. A [[Reader]] who spent her time with the Luminians, she was a ruler known for appointing and delegating to other leaders. During the [[Elder War]], she landed a fatal blow against the [[Great Elder]], and she is known to use a [[sword]] that produces bolts of pure white lightning while her eyes flash white. Though [[Shera]] previously met with her and [[Estyr]] in a conference room, it was later revealed that Loreli had left a message within her weapon. While [[Shera]] believed she had joined the battle, the group was tasked with holding the wheel until Loreli's return.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is a person [[the Emperor]] mentions who might still be alive.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] previously met with [[Loreli and Estyr]] in a conference room.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] left a message in her weapon.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is a [[Regent]] who would be after the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] was a ruler who delegated and appointed other rulers as a guide.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is the [[Regent of the West]] and first of the [[Luminian Order]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is a woman who was called by [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] has dark skin and hair in a hundred braids.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is the original [[Pilgrim]] and the original [[Knight]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] is the Daughter of [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] landed a fatal blow on the [[Great Elder]] during the [[Elder War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The group needs to hold the wheel until [[Loreli]] returns.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] thought [[Loreli]] had joined the battle.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]]'s eyes can flash white.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] spent her time with the Luminians.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] uses a [[sword]] and produces lightning-bright bolts of pure white.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“A forgotten man is invisible,” as Loreli once put it.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|And if she was an Elderspawn who had perfected her disguise to this degree, then as the great strategist Loreli had once said, “Sometimes one is simply beaten.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Scholars]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
